title: Crypto platform Tothemoon secures MiCA licence in Cyprus
snippet: Tothemoon, a global crypto platform, today announced that it has secured authorisation from the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission (CySEC) as a Crypto-Asset Service Provider (CASP) under the European Union’s Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA).

title: NCI and DataExpert launch crypto compliance training programme
snippet: The European Anti-Money Laundering Regulation (AMLR) will come into force on 10 July 2027, introducing stricter requirements for financial institutions, crypto-asset service providers (CASPs) and other regulated entities acting as financial gatekeepers

title: Robinhood links with dYdX Labs to launch new DEX Arcus
snippet: The crypto protocol dYdX has rebranded as Arcus and is joining Robinhood’s new blockchain to bring perpetual and tokenized stock trading.

title: Robinhood rolls out public blockchain, plans crypto trading for UK residents
snippet: The company announced a suite of DeFi products, plans for launching crypto trading in the UK and its public mainnet after months of testing.

title: Robinhood Launches 'AI-Native' Ethereum Layer-2 Network, Tokenized Stock Trading
snippet: Brokerage and crypto exchange Robinhood opened the public mainnet for its Arbitrum-powered Ethereum layer-2 network on Wednesday.

title: Korea’s unified ledger paper is silent on privacy. Central banks should take note
snippet: In preparation for a talk at the ECB Forum today, the Bank of Korea published a paper on its unified ledger Project Hangang (Han River). title: Robinhood Chain goes live on mainnet alongside 24/7 tokenized stocks, Lighter perps and planned crypto agentic trading
snippet: Robinhood Chain, a Layer 2 built using Arbitrum's tech stack, went live on public mainnet, with partners including Uniswap from day one.

title: Lightspark becomes first payments company in Estonia to get MiCA licence
snippet: Today, Lightspark Payments Europe AS announced it received a crypto-asset service provider (CASP) authorization under the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA), together with authorization to operate as an electronic money institution (EMI), from Estonia's Financial Supervision Authority (

title: Forward Industries Shares Spike as Leading Solana Treasury Adds $38 Million in SOL
snippet: Shares in top Solana treasury firm Forward Industries are jumping Wedesday after announcing that it added over 500,000 SOL to its stash.

title: Morning Minute: Major New Stablecoin Launch Shakes Incumbents
snippet: Open USD takes a shot at USDC and USDT, with backing from heavy hitters including Visa, Mastercard and Google.

title: Robinhood Launches Blockchain Designed for Real-World Assets
snippet: Robinhood Markets has launched the public mainnet of Robinhood Chain, a Layer 2 blockchain that the company said is purpose-built for real-world assets. Robinhood Chain is built using the Arbitrum Platform to institutional standards, is natively connected to Robinhood’s onchain users, and has deep i

title: Tradeweb executes real-time tokenized US Treasury transaction on Canton Network
snippet: Franklin Templeton transferred a tokenized US Treasury to Virtu Financial in what Tradeweb said was the first real-time transaction settled against USDCx.

title: Grasshopper adds stablecoin-based payments capability
snippet: Grasshopper, the client-first, full-service digital bank, today announced the launch of a new stablecoin-based payments capability.

title: Bank of Korea governor outlines tokenized bond vision, unified ledger plan
snippet: The Bank of Korea’s governor praised tokenized government bonds for easing the issuance and management of government debt during a panel discussion at the ECB Forum.

title: French banking giant Crédit Agricole launches EURXT euro stablecoin
snippet: Crédit Agricole’s CACEIS launches a euro-pegged stablecoin on Ethereum with 20.02 million tokens issued, targeting institutional flows and tokenized fund access.

title: Panther Hollow launches multi-strategy merchant bank focused on compliant RWA and yield strategies
snippet: Panther is a hybrid merchant bank, fund complex, and incubator focused on Ethereum, Canton, Solana, and StarkNet.

title: Ark Invest scoops up $18 million in Circle shares as stock dips 41% over past month
snippet: Circle dropped 1% today after falling nearly 18% on Tuesday following the launch of the rival stablecoin project OUSD.

title: CRCL Sell-Off 'Looks Overdone' Say Analysts as Circle CEO Addresses Open USD Threat
snippet: Analysts don't think the threat of a new stablecoin launch was enough to warrant a major Circle (CRCL) sell-off on Tuesday.

title: Bernstein sees 203% upside for Circle even as new stablecoin rival OUSD debuts
snippet: Bernstein reaffirms Outperform on Circle with a $190 target after OUSD's launch sent CRCL stock down over 17%.

title: Solana launches onchain governance and sets entry fee at 100,000 SOL staked
BitMine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin Accelerate Wall Street Ethereum Push With Nonprofit Launch
snippet: Ethereum Institutional will serve as a point of contact for financial institutions seeking to get more involved with on-chain infrastructure.

title: Solana-based prediction market app on Phantom wallet launches
snippet: “Prediction markets are one of the most powerful applications you can build on a high-performance blockchain,” said Solana Foundation.

title: Symbiotic officially pivots to collateral markets with Core V2 launch
snippet: Symbiotic now powers shared collateral infrastructure that can support multiple DeFi use cases like insurance, credit, and RWAs.

title: Anchorage Digital brings off-exchange settlement to Binance
snippet: The integration addresses one of the biggest obstacles keeping institutional capital on the sidelines of crypto markets: exchange counterparty risk.

title: Forward Industries jumps 17% after expanding Solana treasury to 7.55 million SOL
snippet: Forward Industries holds more SOL than the next three largest publicly traded Solana treasury companies combined.

title: Nebeus receives MiCA CASP authorisation
snippet: Nebeus has been authorised by Spain's CNMV as a Crypto-Asset Service Provider (CASP) under the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulation, placing the Barcelona-based fintech among the first regulated firms able to passport digital asset services across the European Economic Area.

title: Europe's MiCA rollout sparks debate over who wins under new crypto rules
Last-minute MiCA approvals mark end of EU transition period
snippet: A final wave of MiCA approvals expanded Europe's roster of licensed crypto firms as the transitional period came to a close.

title: Taiwan Passes Sweeping Crypto Law With Licensing, Stablecoin Rules
snippet: The new law puts virtual asset firms under FSC oversight for the first time and sets reserve-and-trust rules for stablecoins.

title: Ahead of NYSE Listing, Securitize Exec Says DeFi Can Break Wall Street's Grip on Stock Lending
snippet: Securitize President Brett Redfearn argues that tokenization will bring crypto's core benefit of disintermediation to retail investors.

title: Tokenized Google stock inflated 7,700% in rare DeFi lending exploit

snippet: Multi-Asset Trading Terminals The integration of traditional equities into crypto venues represents a fundamental paradigm shift in global trading infrastructure. title: The stablecoin bandwagon is getting crowded
snippet: For all their momentum, stablecoins’ moderate benefits come with a host of drawbacks

title: Circle CEO touts USDC's network advantage as OUSD emerges
snippet: Bernstein said OUSD could become the strongest new challenger to the Circle-Tether duopoly, while flagging unresolved questions around governance, operations and revenue sharing.

title: Digital finance could spur Eurozone integration
snippet: Stablecoins could provide a common safe asset for the bloc and boost demand for the euro and bonds

title: Europe’s MiCA crypto regime is fully in force: Here’s who wins and loses
snippet: With the July 1 deadline now passed, how will the end of MiCA's final transition phase affect users, companies, and the market?
